children.name: IngestData
children.purpose: Read raw data from source, parse records, store in raw_data, and log ingestion
children.behavior: Based on source type, read from CSV/JSON/API, parse into records, store in raw_data, and append log entry
children.signature: def IngestData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must parse all records before writing to raw_data
Log entry must include step name, timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

acceptance_criteria.description: raw_data contains all parsed records after ingestion
pipeline_log contains an ingestion entry with correct fields

children.name: TransformData
children.purpose: Apply transformation rules to raw_data, store in processed_data, skip malformed records
children.behavior: Read raw_data, apply each rule to each record, skip and log malformed records, store valid results in processed_data
children.signature: def TransformData(pipeline_request: dict, raw_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must skip malformed records without failing entire batch
Log entry must include step name, timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data contains all valid transformed records
pipeline_log contains a transformation entry with correct fields

children.name: ValidateData
children.purpose: Check processed_data against quality rules, mark invalid records, compute quality_score
children.behavior: Read processed_data, apply quality rules to each record, compute quality_score, mark invalid records, store results back to processed_data
children.signature: def ValidateData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

global_vars.description: Read records for validation, write back with quality_score and invalid marks

data_operations.description: Read records, update with quality_score and invalid marks

constraints.description: Must compute quality_score for each record
Log entry must include step name, timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

acceptance_criteria.description: processed_data records have quality_score and invalid marks
pipeline_log contains a validation entry with correct fields

children.name: ExportData
children.purpose: Format validated records as output and log export
children.behavior: Read processed_data, filter only validated records, format as CSV or JSON, return as data list, log export
children.signature: def ExportData(pipeline_request: dict, processed_data: database) -> dict

constraints.description: Must filter only validated records before export
Log entry must include step name, timestamp, records_in, records_out, errors

acceptance_criteria.description: export_result contains only validated records in correct format
pipeline_log contains an export entry with correct fields

governance_notes: Parent global_vars conservation verified: raw_data (read_write) covered by IngestData (write) + TransformData (read); processed_data (read_write) covered by TransformData (write) + ValidateData (read_write) + ExportData (read); pipeline_log (read_write) covered by all four children (write). Each child's global_vars is a subset of parent's global_vars. No parent operation is dropped.
